services.title: Free Consultation
services.description: Finding the right therapist is an important part of counseling. I offer a free 15-20 minute phone consultation to explore your needs and determine if we are the right fit.

services.title: Individual Therapy
services.description: Offered both in-person and virtually. I accept private pay and am an in-network provider for several major insurance plans.

services.title: Group Therapy
services.description: I have run a variety of groups including: Alcohol and Drug Support Groups, LGBTQIA+ Support Groups, DBT Skills Group and Interpersonal Process groups.

billingText: Private pay is accepted at a rate of $160 per session. For out-of-network providers, I am happy to provide a superbill for you to submit for potential reimbursement.
goodFaithText: Under the "No Surprises Act," you have the right to receive a "Good Faith Estimate" explaining how much your medical care will cost. This applies to patients who do not have insurance or are not using insurance. For questions or more information, please visit www.cms.gov/nosurprises.
